description: Image generation strategy -- Flux.1 Schnell prompt engineering per slot type per Section 4.7. Perspective-aware prompting for floor/wall/ceiling textures (e.g., tunnel floor needs a perspective-correct ground texture). Prompt templates with {theme} placeholder for all slot types across verified geometries. Guidelines for transparency requests. Cache category normalization for semantic caching (OBJ-054).
notes: Tier 4 integration. Medium priority. Informs SKILL.md prompt templates (OBJ-072) and semantic caching (OBJ-054). Spec defines SlotPromptGuidance type, SLOT_PROMPT_REGISTRY with two-level resolution (geometry-specific -> default fallback), perspective-aware prompting rules (P1-P4), transparency guidelines (T1-T3), and cache category normalization. Full reference implementations for default taxonomy (5 slots) and tunnel geometry (5 slots). Content requirements tables for stage, canyon, flyover.
